methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 45.3x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Fergani Space is a private-stage space and aerospace company founded by Selçuk Bayraktar. The valuation universe comprises 5 public comparables (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace, though the full dataset spans 23 same-sector entities.

Two standard triangulation methods are inapplicable here. Peer-median analysis fails due to insufficient same-stage or adjacent-stage datapoints—while 23 Space & Aerospace peers exist in the broader universe, none meet the tighter filters (same stage, adjacent stage, similar valuation tier) required to generate a credible median. Public-comp anchoring cannot proceed because Fergani Space's revenue is not on file; this is typical for private companies. The public sector median P/S of 45.3x across the 6 traded comparables is observable but cannot be meaningfully applied without the target's revenue figure.

No triangulated valuation range can be responsibly derived from the available data. Meaningful valuation support would require either Fergani Space's disclosed or estimated revenue, or identification of at least three same-stage or adjacent-stage private peers with known valuations. The primary uncertainty is revenue visibility; secondary uncertainty is whether the private peer set (SpaceX, Blue Origin, etc.) contains sufficiently close stage-and-scale matches to enable meaningful benchmarking. Further disclosure or estimation work is prerequisite.
